strategyView.title: Crafting simulator
strategyView.intro: Set your target good mods and budget, then compare strategies. Success rule: minimum affix count, minimum “good” mods (by tier), and a cap on Chaos Orb uses per attempt. Unit costs: Chaos = 1, Essence = 3 unless changed in code.
strategyView.error: Could not load results. Try again.

form.budgetHint: Stops each trial after this many Chaos rolls; Essence + Chaos costs are included where applicable.

strategyView.criteriaLine: Success: at least {minAffixes} affixes and at least {minGood} good mods (tier ≤ {tier}).
strategyView.metaLine: Trials: {trials} · Max chaos per attempt: {maxChaos} · Engine v{version}
strategyView.costLine: Unit costs — Chaos: {chaos} · Essence: {essence} · Essence strategy uses: {essenceKey}
